analysis:
Based on your framework criteria:

**Best CSP:** LULU $110 strike, 2026-07-17, 38 DTE, $3.90/$4.05 bid/ask, 0.33 delta, 34.7% annualized return
- Near 52w low with 71% IVP, excellent timing

**Best CC:** GOOGL $390 strike, 2026-07-17, 38 DTE, $6.00/$6.30 bid/ask, 0.26 delta, 16.3% annualized return
- Strong timing with 63% IVP near highs

**Best Position Income CC:** GOOGL $380 strike, 2026-07-17, 38 DTE, $8.60/$8.95 bid/ask, 0.35 delta, 23.3% annualized return
- Higher premium selling against profitable position

**LEAPS:** None qualify - all fail either IVP threshold (want <50%) or trend requirements

**Bull Call Spreads:** None available

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across most names (NVDA 97%, PLTR 84%, MSFT 91%) creating excellent CSP opportunities but making LEAPS purchases expensive.
